old: 这两件事情类似，处理方法一样。
new: 他们的性格类似，相处很容易。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1: both describe two things being similar with the same outcome framing.

old: These two matters are similar and can be handled the same way.
new: Their personalities are similar, so they get along easily.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: 他用力推开了那扇门。
new: 她用力抱起了那个孩子。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1: both depict using force to push a door open.

old: He pushed the door open with force.
new: She used force to pick up the child.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_2.

old: 他用尽了全力，终于爬到了山顶。
new: 风的力很大，把树都吹倒了。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1: both use 用尽了力/全力…终于 structure with an achievement result.

old: He used all his strength and finally climbed to the mountaintop.
new: The force of the wind was so great that it knocked down the trees.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: 这条路连接了村庄和城市。
new: 这座桥把两个岛连接起来了。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate: row 3939 sentence_1 also uses 这条路连接两个城市.

old: This road connects the village and the city.
new: This bridge connected the two islands.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: 他把两台电脑连接在一起。
new: 电话线把两个城市连接起来。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate: row 3938 sentence_2 also depicts linking two computers with a cable.

old: He linked the two computers together.
new: The telephone line links the two cities.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: 他连续三天没睡觉。
new: 她连续好几天头疼。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate: row 3942 sentence_1 is 他连续工作了三天 — same subject-verb-三天 pattern.

old: He didn't sleep for three days in a row.
new: She had a headache for several days in a row.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_1.

old: 这个学生的表现良好。
new: 他的身体状况良好，可以参加比赛。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1: both describe a student's academic or behavioral performance as good.

old: This student's performance is good.
new: His physical condition is good; he can participate in the competition.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_2.

old: verb, morpheme
new: verb, morpheme, classifier
reason: This row illustrates 令 as a measure word (classifier) for reams of paper; the classifier usage is missing from the POS field.

old: He was admitted to Peking University.
new: He was enrolled at Peking University.
reason: Definition for this row is 'to enroll'; translation should use 'enrolled' not 'admitted' (which belongs to the other 录取 row).

old: 学习数学可以训练逻辑。
new: 逻辑清晰的人更容易解决问题。
reason: 训练逻辑 is an unnatural collocation; 逻辑 is not typically a direct object of 训练.

old: Studying mathematics can train logic.
new: People with clear logic find it easier to solve problems.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: 枝, 管
new: 支, 管
reason: 枝 (tree branch) is the wrong character; the correct classifier for writing brushes and similar slender objects is 支, which is also what sentence_3 correctly uses.

old: Magic bewilders the audience.
new: Magic captivates the audience.
reason: 着迷 means 'to be fascinated/captivated,' not 'bewildered'; translation doesn't match the sentence.

old: 学校操场的面积很大。
new: 这块农田的面积有五百平方米。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1: both simply state that a place has a large surface area.

old: The surface area of the school playground is very large.
new: This farmland has a surface area of five hundred square meters.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_2.

old: This shop is aimed at young people.
new: This shop faces young people.
reason: Definition is 'to face'; 'aimed at' misrepresents the word. 面向 here means directed/oriented toward.

old: This project is aimed at all students.
new: This project faces all students.
reason: Same issue as translation_1: 'aimed at' misrepresents 面向 whose listed definition is 'to face'.

old: 外面的孩子一直在闹，打扰了大家。
new: 这条街上太闹了，我睡不着觉。
reason: Original sentence_3 uses 闹 as a verb (to make a ruckus), not as an adjective meaning 'noisy'; should illustrate the adjective usage.

old: The kids outside kept being noisy and disturbed everyone.
new: This street is too noisy; I can't sleep.
reason: Accompanies corrected sentence_3.

old: This is an internal company matter.
new: This is a matter inside the company.
reason: Definition is 'interior'; the translation uses 'internal' (an adjective) rather than 'interior/inside' to reflect the spatial sense of 内部.
